Title: The Devils (The Devils, #1)
Author: Joe Abercrombie
My Review: Well, this was a fun ride! Really enjoyed the Dirty Dozen energy mixed with a bit of Suicide Squad seasoning, all in Abercrombie's signature wit. The grimdark bones are all there, but The Devils wears them very lightly. Fast, funny, pleasingly ruthless and occasionally tender in ways you won't see coming. A very good time with very bad people.
